session.user: Run `make lint ty` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make lint ty` command from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint and ty for linting checks

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 make: *** [Makefile:21: ty] Error 1
uv run ruff check All checks passed! uv run ty check error[unresolved-attribute]: Attribute `pr_number` is not defined on `OneShotDryRunResult` in union `OneShotDispatchResult | OneShotDryRunResult` --> src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py:327:52 | 326 | if dispatch_result is not None: 327 | successful_dispatches.append((node.id, dispatch_result.pr_number)) | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 328 | dispatched_count += 1 | info: rule `unresolved-attribute` is enabled by default
error[unresolved-attribute]: Attribute `pr_number` is not defined on `OneShotDryRunResult` in union `OneShotDispatchResult | OneShotDryRunResult` --> src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py:859:23 | 857 | issue_number=issue_number, 858 | node_id=target_node.id, 859 | pr_number=dispatch_result.pr_number, | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 860 | ) | info: rule `unresolved-attribute` is enabled by default
error[unresolved-attribute]: Attribute `run_id` is not defined on `OneShotDryRunResult` in union `OneShotDispatchResult | OneShotDryRunResult` --> src/erk/core/workflow_smoke_test.py:108:60 |
... [33 lines omitted] ...
error[unresolved-attribute]: Attribute `pr_number` is not defined on `OneShotDryRunResult` in union `OneShotDispatchResult | OneShotDryRunResult` error[unresolved-attribute]: Attribute `run_id` is not defined on `OneShotDryRunResult` in union `OneShotDispatchResult | OneShotDryRunResult`
session.assistant:
The `make lint ty` command has completed with failures.
**Summary:**
- **ruff check**: passed (all checks passed) - **ty check**: failed with 5 diagnostics
**Type Checking Errors (ty):**
All 5 errors are unresolved-attribute errors related to union type discrimination. The code is attempting to access attributes that don't exist on all members of the union type `OneShotDispatchResult | OneShotDryRunResult`.
| File | Line | Column | Error | Context | |------|------|--------|-------|---------| | `src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py` | 327 | 52 | `Attribute 'pr_number' is not defined on 'OneShotDryRunResult'` | `dispatch_result.pr_number` | | `src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py` | 859 | 23 | `Attribute 'pr_number' is not defined on 'OneShotDryRunResult'` | `dispatch_result.pr_number` | | `src/erk/core/workflow_smoke_test.py` | 108 | 60 | `Attribute 'run_id' is not defined on 'OneShotDryRunResult'` | `result.run_id` | | `src/erk/core/workflow_smoke_test.py` | 112 | 19 | `Attribute 'pr_number' is not defined on 'OneShotDryRunResult'` | `result.pr_number` | | `src/erk/core/workflow_smoke_test.py` | 113 | 16 | `Attribute 'run_id' is not defined on 'OneShotDryRunResult'` | `result.run_id` |
The issue appears to be that code is treating a union type without properly narrowing the type first. The `OneShotDryRunResult` union member doesn't have `pr_number` or `run_id` attributes, but the code is accessing them without type guards.
